### Checklist
- [ ] `terraform fmt` passes locally
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes locally
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or sensitive values
- [ ] `.tfvars` files updated if required
- [ ] Reviewed the plan output in the PR checks tab

### Rollback Plan
<!-- How to revert if this causes issues -->
Revert this PR — GitOps will re-apply the previous state automatically.
